I am going to just do a quick rundown on how to build a retargeting audience based off of video views. And so what you can do, we are in our asset library again under audiences, so assets audiences. And we're going to press create audience. We're going to do a custom audience. And we are going to select use Facebook source video. And so this is going to allow us to choose our content and choose our content type. For us, we are going to be looking at people who have watched a video at, watched at least 95% of your video. So I definitely take a look at your content that has lots of 100% video views. And then just know that if you're getting 95%, you're getting people that watched like everything except your probably last call to action. So it's good to retarget. So you have people who watch 95% of your video and then you get to choose the videos. Once you press choose the videos, you got to select the correct Facebook page that is correlating to your account. You can see I have a few. So I'm going to go ahead and select Alex. That's where we run or where we upload all of our videos. And so I'm actually going to expand the state range out. So I'll show you selected selected day. And I'm going to just choose like January to what's today, May 8. So we'll just do that update. And so this is going to give us pages of our videos, as you can see. And so what we need to do now is choose what videos that we want to use videos with high numbers, lots of three second video views are likely the ones that are likely the videos in your account that have high 100% watch views. So those those tend to be the best ones to target. Right. And so you can see Facebook does show you your three second video views right so just scrolling through selecting your ads that you are your video content that you want to include in this in this test or excuse me in this audience. And you just kind of going through I'm just looking at content that's been posted looking for things that have high three second video views. I know a lot of this content like these two are some of our top performing ads. In fact, all three of these are some of our top performing ads or we're top performing at one time. That's why they have such high engagement. Right. And so just again scrolling through my content looking at what I have out there and finding the things that I know have done good for me. Right. And I'm going to trust Nicole 160 that is 167,000 views right like that that's outstanding. So once we've selected our content, we're going to just press confirm. After that we can choose how long ago did they have to be a 95% watch what was it and just in the last year. Do you want to do in the last 30 days. What what do you want to do. Obviously the the shorter the number here that means that the the content that they consumed in these videos is going to be more fresh on their mind. If you have it out to 365 days. Well, they might not remember who you were or why they watched your video even right so I like to do around 30 to 60 days because that should be relatively fresh. I'm just keeping in mind knowing that the in order to do 30 or 60 days this content still has to be running right if it's not still running then they're not going to have any that meet the criteria of 95% watched in the last 60 days. That said as people continue to watch the content they will get added into your audience and and so this will be an audience that that does become a beneficial kind of like retarget. You're going to name your audience and the what we'll just call these winners and it is that people watch 95% and it's for videos. Right and so just just naming it something so I know what it is and then just press create audience. Let's you know that it's going to take up to 30 minutes for your audience to be ready to be used and then it's going to drive you straight over into creating an ad with using this audience or or expand your audience. Don't really need to mess with any of those things there because we now can see that we have this winners people watch custom audience engagement video it's populating so it's looking and it will eventually spit in the size there if it's if it's large enough to show the size of the audience. If it's below a thousand it just shows below a thousand and that's not necessarily bad for retargeting. It just means that that list is going to continue to grow so we have our we have our audience building out and if we were to want to use that audience we can simply go into our ad account. And we'll just go ahead and act like we're going to create a new ad for this campaign. I'm not wrong button. Hey when I do that. So we're. Yeah that should be the right button. I'm sorry. We have it in the existing campaign create new ad set and test ad set. Save the draft. It's going to pop us open. And when we come down into our test ad set here. Where we set our audience. We're going to be able to use our our new audience. So there's our audience of winners. People watch 95 percent four videos. That's the audience that shows you that right now the reach is less than 10 because it's still building. But again then you could go build out build out your ad just the traditional way right. You'd have to add an ad to this etc. You know and so you can then publish and save following all those criteria. But essentially you are then retargeting anybody that's watched your content by by using this audience by using this this custom audience and engagement. I hope that helped and was useful for you guys. If you haven't played around with the audience tool on Facebook definitely check it out. There's lots of great things in there. It's a lot easier to use than Google. And so I highly recommend you spend time in the audience tool and learn your way around there. Have a great day everybody.
